component.name: Kanri
component.summary: Kanri is a modern, minimalist Kanban board that works offline

description.p: Kanri is a modern, minimalist Kanban board that works offline — no setup or self-hosting needed, just pure productivity. It's packed with powerful features to help you stay organized and productive. Built with modern technologies such as Nuxt, Tauri and TypeScript, ensuring a smooth and efficient user experience.
